title: Sanitize + nonce for rich markdown in HEEx
prompt:
A blog post LiveView renders user-submitted markdown via `Earmark.as_html!/1` and passes it through `raw/1`: ```elixir def render(assigns) do ~H"""

{@post.title}

{raw(Earmark.as_html!(@post.body_markdown))}
""" end ``` Three layered issues: (1) `Earmark.as_html!/1` does NOT sanitize embedded HTML — a user posting `` inside markdown yields that script verbatim, (2) the output is wrapped with `raw/1` bypassing HEEx auto-escape, (3) even with a sanitizer, inline `
tier_rationale: Hard — requires knowing that Earmark doesn't sanitize, and that HtmlSanitizeEx is the right tool.
